```{r Subset D4 and find ROI markers}
         size=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21, colour="black", fill="white"))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, angle = 45, hjust = 1, face = "italic"),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18),
        axis.title.y = element_blank()) + custom_theme
ggsave_multidevice(filename_base = "YWV04_D4PW_ROI_MarkerDotPlot", width = 12, height = 6)
```
```{r Subset D7 and find ROI markers}
Idents(object_d7) <- "alignment_clusters"
object_d7_subset <- subset(object_d7, idents = d7_clusters)

d7_cluster_marks <- FindAllMarkers(object_d7_subset, assay = "Spatial", only.pos = T,
                                   group.by = "alignment_clusters", verbose = F)

d7_cluster_marks_filtered <- d7_cluster_marks %>%
  filter(p_val_adj < 0.05) %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5)

DotPlot(object_d7, unique(d7_cluster_marks_filtered$gene), idents = d7_clusters,
        cols = "RdYlBu", assay = "Spatial") +
  geom_point(aes(size=pct.exp), shape = 21, colour="black", stroke=0.25) +
  guides(color = guide_colorbar(title = "Average\nExpression"),
         size=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21, colour="black", fill="white"))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, angle = 45, hjust = 1, face = "italic"),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18),
        axis.title.y = element_blank()) + custom_theme
ggsave_multidevice(filename_base = "YWV03_D7PW_ROI_MarkerDotPlot", width = 12, height = 6)
```
```{r Subset D30 and find ROI markers}
Idents(object_d30) <- "alignment_clusters"
object_d30_subset <- subset(object_d30, idents = d30_clusters)

d30_cluster_marks <- FindAllMarkers(object_d30_subset, assay = "Spatial", only.pos = T,
                                   group.by = "alignment_clusters", verbose = F)

d30_cluster_marks_filtered <- d30_cluster_marks %>%
  filter(p_val_adj < 0.05) %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5)

DotPlot(object_d30, unique(d30_cluster_marks_filtered$gene), idents = d30_clusters,
        cols = "RdYlBu", assay = "Spatial") +
  geom_point(aes(size=pct.exp), shape = 21, colour="black", stroke=0.25) +
  guides(color = guide_colorbar(title = "Average\nExpression"),
         size=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21, colour="black", fill="white"))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, angle = 45, hjust = 1, face = "italic"),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18),
        axis.title.y = element_blank()) + custom_theme
ggsave_multidevice(filename_base = "YWV02_D30PW_ROI_MarkerDotPlot", width = 12, height = 6)
```

### Analysis of peripheral cells
We are also interested in quantifying changes in the representation of immune cells
in the wound periphery
```{r Quantify changes in cells in peripheral tissue}

```


### OC-like analysis
Load in the spatial quantification data calculated elsewhere
```{r Loop to plot histograms of genes of interest}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(scCustomize)
library(readxl)

# -----------------------------
# Setup
# -----------------------------
target_population <- "OC-like cells"
genes_of_interest <- c("Tnfsf11", "Tnfrsf11a", "Tnfrsf11b", "Mmp3")
genes_of_interest <- c("Spp1","Ccl3","Ccl8","Ccl9")
gene_colors <- setNames(c("#D53E4F","#3288BD","#66C2A5","#FDAE61"),genes_of_interest) 

gene_colors <- setNames(c("#D53E4F","#FDAE61","#66C2A5","#3288BD"),genes_of_interest) 
# Full projection files (all cells)
full_files <- c(
  "YWV01_UW_MetaclusterDistributionFromWoundSite.csv",
  "YWV04_D4PW_MetaclusterDistributionFromWoundSite.csv",
  "YWV03_D7PW_MetaclusterDistributionFromWoundSite.csv",
  "YWV02_D30PW_MetaclusterDistributionFromWoundSite.csv"
)

# Immune-only files with barcodes
immune_files <- c(
  "YWV01_UW_DistributionFromWoundSite_ImmuneOnly.xlsx",
  "YWV04_D4PW_DistributionFromWoundSite_ImmuneOnly.xlsx",
  "YWV03_D7PW_DistributionFromWoundSite_ImmuneOnly.xlsx",
  "YWV02_D30PW_DistributionFromWoundSite_ImmuneOnly.xlsx"
)

# Seurat objects
objects <- list(
  "YWV01_UW" = object_uw,
  "YWV04_D4PW" = object_d4,
  "YWV03_D7PW" = object_d7,
  "YWV02_D30PW" = object_d30
)

base_path <- "~/SRSP Laboratory Dropbox/SRSP Lab/Resources/Town Square - Data Share/Manuscripts/Wound Healing Atlas Paper/Immunome Paper/Figure 3 Spatial/SpaceFold"

df_list <- list()

# Define a palette for target population
pal <- c("OC-like cells" = "#4D8DC3")

# --------- Loop through datasets--------
for (i in seq_along(full_files)) {
  
  full_file <- full_files[i]
  immune_file <- immune_files[i]
  
  # Extract sample name as e.g., "YWV01_UW"
  sample_name <- paste(strsplit(full_file, "_")[[1]][1:2], collapse = "_")
  
  message("Processing ", sample_name)
  
  # --- Read full projection (all cells) ---
  df_full <- read.csv(file.path(base_path, full_file), row.names = 1)
  
  if (!"barcode" %in% colnames(df_full)) df_full$barcode <- rownames(df_full)
  
  # --- Read immune-only file with barcodes ---
  df_immune <- read_xlsx(file.path(base_path, immune_file))
  
  # --- Filter for target population ---
  df_target <- df_immune %>%
    filter(celltype == target_population) %>%
    dplyr::select(barcode)
  
  # --- Pull gene expression directly from Seurat ---
  seurat_obj <- objects[[sample_name]]
  DefaultAssay(seurat_obj) <- "Spatial"
  genes_present <- intersect(genes_of_interest, rownames(seurat_obj))
  
  expr_mat <- as.data.frame(
    t(GetAssayData(seurat_obj, assay = "Spatial", slot = "data")[genes_present, ])
  )
  expr_mat$barcode <- rownames(expr_mat)
  
  # --- Merge expression with full projection ---
  df_full <- left_join(df_full, expr_mat, by = "barcode")
  
  # --- Timepoint label ---
  tp <- case_when(
    grepl("UW", sample_name) ~ "UW",
    grepl("D4PW", sample_name) ~ "D4PW",
    grepl("D7PW", sample_name) ~ "D7PW",
    grepl("D30PW", sample_name) ~ "D30PW",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )
  df_full$timepoint <- tp
  
  # --- Plot 1: target population distribution ---
  # Filter immune-only data for the target population
  df_plot1 <- df_immune %>% filter(celltype == target_population)
  # --- Bin OC-like cell counts along the tissue axis ---
  df_plot1_binned <- df_plot1 %>%
    mutate(proj_bin = cut(projection, breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.05), include.lowest = TRUE)) %>%
    group_by(proj_bin, celltype) %>%
    summarise(
      cell_count = n(),
      proj_mid = mean(projection, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  # Plot localization as a histogram
  p0 <- ggplot(df_plot1_binned, aes(x = proj_mid, y = cell_count, fill = celltype)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", color = "black", alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
  labs(
    x = "Position along tissue axis",
    y = "Cell Count",
    title = paste0(tp, " — ", target_population, " distribution")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 80)) +
  theme_ggprism_mod(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  custom_theme
  
  # Plot localization as a beeswarm plot
  p1 <- ggplot(df_plot1, aes(x = projection, y = celltype, fill = celltype)) +
    geom_quasirandom(
      shape = 21,
      size = 1.8,
      stroke = 0.25,
      color = "black",
      alpha = 0.9
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
    labs(x = "Position along tissue axis",
         title = paste0(tp, " — ", target_population, " distribution")) +
    theme_ggprism_mod(base_size = 14) +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          axis.title.y = element_blank()) + 
    custom_theme
  
  # --- Plot 2: gene expression heatmap ---
  df_long <- df_full %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(genes_present),
                 names_to = "gene", values_to = "expression") %>%
    mutate(proj_bin = cut(projection, breaks = seq(0,1,by=0.05), include.lowest=TRUE)) %>%
    group_by(gene, proj_bin) %>%
    summarise(mean_expr = mean(expression, na.rm=TRUE),
              proj_mid = mean(projection, na.rm=TRUE),
              .groups="drop")
  
  p2 <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = proj_mid, y = gene, fill = mean_expr)) +
    geom_tile() +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", direction = -1) +
    labs(x = "Position along tissue axis",
         y = NULL,
         fill = "Mean expression",
         title = paste0(tp, " — Expression of genes of interest")) +
    theme_ggprism_mod(base_size = 14) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(face="italic"))
  
  # --- Plot 3: histogram of positive expression ---
  df_hist <- df_full %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(genes_present),
                 names_to = "gene", values_to = "expression") %>%
    mutate(expr_positive = expression > 0,
           proj_bin = cut(projection, breaks=seq(0,1,by=0.05), include.lowest=TRUE)) %>%
    group_by(gene, proj_bin) %>%
    summarise(positive_count = sum(expr_positive, na.rm=TRUE),
              proj_mid = mean(projection, na.rm=TRUE),
              .groups="drop")
  
  p3 <- ggplot(df_hist, aes(x = proj_mid, y = positive_count, fill = gene)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge", color="black", alpha=0.9) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = gene_colors) +
   # scale_fill_viridis_d(option="plasma") +
    labs(x = "Position along tissue axis",
         y = "Number of cells (expression > 0)",
         fill = "Gene",
         title = paste0(tp, " — Localization of gene expression")) +
    theme_ggprism_mod(base_size = 14)
  
  # Make histogram faceted by each gene
  p4 <- p3 +
    facet_grid(rows = vars(gene), scales = "free_y") + 
    NoLegend()
  
  # --- Plot 5: mean expression per bin (faceted by gene) ---
  df_mean <- df_full %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = all_of(genes_present),
      names_to = "gene",
      values_to = "expression"
    ) %>%
    mutate(proj_bin = cut(projection, breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.05), include.lowest = TRUE)) %>%
    group_by(gene, proj_bin) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_expr = mean(expression, na.rm = TRUE),
      proj_mid = mean(projection, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  p5 <- ggplot(df_mean, aes(x = proj_mid, y = mean_expr, fill = gene)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge", color = "black", alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = gene_colors) +
   # scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma") +
    facet_wrap(~gene, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
    labs(
      x = "Position along tissue axis",
      y = "Mean expression",
      fill = "Gene",
      title = paste0(tp, " — Mean expression of genes across tissue axis")
    ) +
    theme_ggprism_mod(base_size = 14) + 
    NoLegend()

  # --- Save plots ---
  base_out <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(full_file)
  
  ggsave_multidevice(
    filename_base = paste0(base_out, "_", gsub(" ", "_", target_population), "_CountHistogram"),
    plot = p0, width = 5, height = 3, dpi = 300
  )
  
  ggsave_multidevice(
    filename_base = paste0(base_out, "_", gsub(" ", "_", target_population), "_Distribution"),
    plot = p1, width = 5, height = 3, dpi = 300
  )
  
  ggsave_multidevice(
    filename_base = paste0(base_out, "_GenesOfInterest_Heatmap"),
    plot = p2, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300
  )
  
  ggsave_multidevice(
    filename_base = paste0(base_out, "_GenesOfInterest_Histogram"),
    plot = p3, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300
  )
  
  ggsave_multidevice(
    filename_base = paste0(base_out, "_GenesOfInterest_FacetedHistogram"),
    plot = p4, width = 5, height = 7, dpi = 300
  )
  
  ggsave_multidevice(
    filename_base = paste0(base_out, "_GenesOfInterest_MeanExpressionHist"),
    plot = p5, width = 5, height = 7, dpi = 300
  )
  
  # --- Store for combined plotting if needed ---
  df_list[[sample_name]] <- df_full
}

# Optional: combine all timepoints
combined_df <- bind_rows(df_list)

```
We can do the same, this time asking is the expression specific to an immune mode
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(scCustomize)
library(readxl)

# -----------------------------
# Setup
# -----------------------------
genes_of_interest <- c("Spp1","Ccl8")
gene_colors <- setNames(c("#D53E4F","#66C2A5"), genes_of_interest)

# Full projection files (all cells)
full_files <- c(
  "YWV01_UW_MetaclusterDistributionFromWoundSite.csv",
  "YWV04_D4PW_MetaclusterDistributionFromWoundSite.csv",
  "YWV03_D7PW_MetaclusterDistributionFromWoundSite.csv",
  "YWV02_D30PW_MetaclusterDistributionFromWoundSite.csv"
)

# Immune-only files with barcodes
immune_files <- c(
  "YWV01_UW_DistributionFromWoundSite_ImmuneOnly.xlsx",
  "YWV04_D4PW_DistributionFromWoundSite_ImmuneOnly.xlsx",
  "YWV03_D7PW_DistributionFromWoundSite_ImmuneOnly.xlsx",
  "YWV02_D30PW_DistributionFromWoundSite_ImmuneOnly.xlsx"
)

# Seurat objects
objects <- list(
  "YWV01_UW" = object_uw,
  "YWV04_D4PW" = object_d4,
  "YWV03_D7PW" = object_d7,
  "YWV02_D30PW" = object_d30
)

base_path <- "~/SRSP Laboratory Dropbox/SRSP Lab/Resources/Town Square - Data Share/Manuscripts/Wound Healing Atlas Paper/Immunome Paper/Figure 3 Spatial/SpaceFold"

# Define immune mode groups
recruitment <- c("Monocytes I","Monocytes II","Monocytes III","Macrophages I","Macrophages III",
                 "OC-like cells","moDCs","Neutrophils I","Neutrophils II","Basophils")
restoration <-c("cDC1","cDC2","pDCs","Neutrophils III","Mast cells","NK cells","T cells","B cells")
neostasis <- c("Macrophages II","Macrophages IV","Cycling Macrophages",
               "Migratory DCs","Langerhans cells","γδT cells","Tregs","ILCs")

recruitment_modes <- list(
  "Recruitment" = recruitment,
  "Restoration" = restoration,
  "Neostasis" = neostasis
)

df_list <- list() # store combined data

# -----------------------------
# Loop through datasets
# -----------------------------
for (i in seq_along(full_files)) {

  full_file <- full_files[i]
  immune_file <- immune_files[i]

  # Extract sample name
  sample_name <- paste(strsplit(full_file, "_")[[1]][1:2], collapse = "_")
  message("Processing ", sample_name)

  # --- Read full projection (all cells) ---
  df_full <- read.csv(file.path(base_path, full_file), row.names = 1)
  if (!"barcode" %in% colnames(df_full)) df_full$barcode <- rownames(df_full)

  # --- Read immune-only file with barcodes ---
  df_immune <- read_xlsx(file.path(base_path, immune_file))

  # --- Pull gene expression directly from Seurat ---
  seurat_obj <- objects[[sample_name]]
  DefaultAssay(seurat_obj) <- "Spatial"
  genes_present <- intersect(genes_of_interest, rownames(seurat_obj))

  expr_mat <- as.data.frame(
    t(GetAssayData(seurat_obj, assay = "Spatial", slot = "data")[genes_present, ])
  )
  expr_mat$barcode <- rownames(expr_mat)

  # --- Merge expression with full projection ---
  df_full <- left_join(df_full, expr_mat, by = "barcode")

  # --- Timepoint label ---
  tp <- case_when(
    grepl("UW", sample_name) ~ "UW",
    grepl("D4PW", sample_name) ~ "D4PW",
    grepl("D7PW", sample_name) ~ "D7PW",
    grepl("D30PW", sample_name) ~ "D30PW",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )
  df_full$timepoint <- tp

  # --- Loop over immune mode groups ---
  for (mode_name in names(recruitment_modes)) {

    group_cells <- recruitment_modes[[mode_name]]

    # Filter immune data for this group
    df_group <- df_immune %>% filter(celltype %in% group_cells)
    df_group_expr <- df_full %>% filter(barcode %in% df_group$barcode)

    # Define color palette for this group (optional: one color per cell type)
    pal <- setNames(
      RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(n = length(group_cells), name = "Set2")[seq_along(group_cells)],
      group_cells
    )

    # --- Plot 4: histogram of positive expression ---
    df_hist <- df_group_expr %>%
      pivot_longer(cols = all_of(genes_present),
                   names_to = "gene", values_to = "expression") %>%
      mutate(expr_positive = expression > 0,
             proj_bin = cut(projection, breaks=seq(0,1,by=0.05), include.lowest=TRUE)) %>%
      group_by(gene, proj_bin) %>%
      summarise(positive_count = sum(expr_positive, na.rm=TRUE),
                proj_mid = mean(projection, na.rm=TRUE),
                .groups="drop")
      
    p3 <- ggplot(df_hist, aes(x = proj_mid, y = positive_count, fill = gene)) +
      geom_col(position = "dodge", color="black", alpha=0.9) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = gene_colors) +
      labs(x = "Position along tissue axis",
           y = "Number of cells (expression > 0)",
           fill = "Gene",
           title = paste0(tp, " — ", mode_name, " positive gene expression")) +
      theme_classic() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 14, family = "Arial"))

    p4 <- p3 +
      facet_wrap(~gene, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") + 
      labs(title = paste0(tp, " — ", mode_name, " gene expression")) +
      theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic", size = 16),
       strip.background = element_blank() ) +
      NoLegend()

    # --- Plot 5: mean expression per bin (faceted) ---
    df_mean <- df_group_expr %>%
      pivot_longer(cols = all_of(genes_present),
                   names_to = "gene", values_to = "expression") %>%
      mutate(proj_bin = cut(projection, breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.05), include.lowest = TRUE)) %>%
      group_by(gene, proj_bin) %>%
      summarise(mean_expr = mean(expression, na.rm = TRUE),
                proj_mid = mean(projection, na.rm = TRUE),
                .groups = "drop")

    p5 <- ggplot(df_mean, aes(x = proj_mid, y = mean_expr, fill = gene)) +
      geom_col(position = "dodge", color = "black", alpha = 0.9) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = gene_colors) +
      facet_wrap(~gene, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
      labs(x = "Position along tissue axis",
           y = "Mean expression",
           fill = "Gene",
           title = paste0(tp, " — ", mode_name, " mean gene expression")) +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 14, family = "Arial"),
            strip.text = element_text(face = "italic", size = 16),
       strip.background = element_blank() ) +
      NoLegend()

    # --- Save plots ---
    base_out <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(full_file)

    ggsave_multidevice(paste0(base_out, "_", mode_name, "_Histogram"), plot = p3, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300)
    ggsave_multidevice(paste0(base_out, "_", mode_name, "_FacetedHistogram"), plot = p4, width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 300)
    ggsave_multidevice(paste0(base_out, "_", mode_name, "_MeanExpressionHist"), plot = p5, width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 300)

  } # end group loop

  # Store combined expression for optional downstream analyses
  df_list[[sample_name]] <- df_full

} # end sample loop

# Combine all samples if needed
combined_df <- bind_rows(df_list)

```

```{r}

```
